trades.market: Will Claude by Anthropic be #2 Free App in the US Apple App Store on March 27?
trades.research_summary: Apple App Store charts as of today show Claude is currently the #2 free app in the US (behind ChatGPT at #1, ahead of Gemini at #4). Claude has maintained this top-2 position for several weeks since its surge to #1 in late Feb/early March following the Pentagon standoff. With stable positioning and no disruptive catalysts expected, the status quo gives a ~63% base rate that it remains #2 on March 27, well above the 49% market price.
key_factors: Claude is currently #2 on US App Store free chart right now
Has maintained top-2 position for 3+ weeks since Pentagon controversy surge
No major competing app launch or news event likely to displace it in 2 days
trades.bear_case: App Store rankings are inherently volatile; a viral app launch, ChatGPT feature update, or Perplexity/Gemini surge could push Claude to #3+ within 48 hours

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Taipei be 27°C or higher on March 26?
trades.research_summary: Multiple forecast sources show conflicting signals for March 26 Taipei high. Weather25 shows 28°C high, Meteored shows 79°F (26.1°C), and meteodays shows 75°F (24°C). However, recent actual observations this week show Taipei reaching 80-82°F (27-28°C) on multiple days. AccuWeather recorded 82°F on March 18, 81°F on March 16, and 80°F on March 23. With continued warm conditions and some forecasts showing 28°C, 7% seems underpriced.
key_factors: Weather25 forecasts 28°C high for March 26, above the 27°C threshold
Recent actual observations show Taipei hitting 80-82°F (27-28°C) multiple days this week
Evening rain expected on March 26 could suppress afternoon peak but not eliminate chance of 27°C earlier
trades.bear_case: Majority of forecast models (Meteored 79°F, Meteodays 75°F) show highs below 27°C. Polymarket traders pricing today's Taipei high at only 24°C at the airport suggests consistently cooler readings. Rain arriving could keep temperatures suppressed.

trades.market: Will Aaron Rai finish in the Top 5 at the 2026 Texas Children's Houston Open?
trades.research_summary: Aaron Rai withdrew from the Houston Open with a neck injury before his first-round tee time, confirmed by PGA Tour Communications. Taylor Moore replaced him. A withdrawn player cannot finish Top 5, yet the market still prices YES at 49¢.
key_factors: Rai officially withdrew before Round 1 with neck injury
PGA Tour Communications confirmed, Taylor Moore replaced him
Market has not adjusted to this news at all
trades.bear_case: Market could potentially void/refund rather than resolve NO if platform has special WD rules

trades.market: Will Hezbollah conduct military action against Israel on March 27, 2026?
trades.research_summary: There is an active full-scale war since March 2. Hezbollah fired 600+ times at Israel in 24 hours on March 26 (a record), averaging 150 rockets/day. Hezbollah's chief vowed to fight 'without limits' on March 25. Zero ceasefire prospects exist.
key_factors: Active war with daily Hezbollah rocket/drone attacks since March 2
Record 600+ attacks in 24 hours on March 26
Hezbollah chief explicitly vowed continued escalation
trades.bear_case: Surprise ceasefire before March 27, though absolutely no signals of this

trades.research_summary: White's last 4 games: 27, 27, 24, 18 pts — all over 14.5. He averages 15.9 PPG across 12 Hornets games and 21.6 over his last 5. He's active tonight vs NYK with no injury designation. Charlotte's offense is red-hot, averaging 131 PPG at home over their last 4.
key_factors: Last 5 games average 21.6 PPG, all clearing 14.5
Fully healthy, active tonight in high-scoring Charlotte offense
Shooting 45.9% FG and 40.3% from 3PT since joining Hornets
trades.bear_case: Bench role means variable minutes; tough Knicks defense; blowout in either direction could limit run

trades.market: Will Kanye release BULLY by April 3?
trades.research_summary: BULLY is scheduled for release TODAY (March 27) on Spotify's pre-release page. The vinyl has already leaked, billboards are up nationwide, the tracklist was officially posted March 25, and SoFi concerts are April 1 & 3. Even with Kanye's 7+ prior delays, the album only needs to drop by April 3, providing a week buffer beyond the scheduled date.
key_factors: Spotify pre-release confirms Mar 27 with 13 tracks
Album already finished - vinyl leaked Mar 24
Concerts at SoFi Apr 1 & 3 strongly incentivize release
April 3 deadline gives 7 extra days buffer beyond scheduled date
trades.bear_case: Kanye has delayed 7+ times already and Billboard notes he 'stopped short of confirming' the March 27 date; he could theoretically pull the Spotify listing at the last minute

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Wuhan be 21°C on March 28?
trades.research_summary: Multiple forecast sources (AccuWeather 72°F/22.2°C, Meteored 73°F/22.8°C, weather-atlas 22°C) converge on a high of ~22°C for March 28. Polymarket AI notes model ensembles give 20-21°C combined a 31% probability. With same-day forecast error SD of 0.7-1.2°C, the probability of hitting exactly 21°C (20.5-21.5°C band) is approximately 10-17%, well above the 6% market price.
key_factors: Forecast centered at 22°C with tight same-day uncertainty
21°C is only 1 degree below forecast - common occurrence
Model ensemble spread explicitly includes 20-21°C as viable alternatives at 31% combined
trades.bear_case: Clear skies and hazy sunshine reduce forecast uncertainty; models may be tightly centered at exactly 22°C with very little downside risk, making 21°C less likely than a normal distribution would suggest

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Singapore be 32°C on March 29?
trades.research_summary: Polymarket traders with $59K volume price 32°C at 55%, far above this market's 32%. Singapore Met forecasts afternoon thundery showers that would cap solar heating around 32°C. Climatological March average high is ~31.7°C and 2026 has been warmer-than-normal, but rain caps the upside. Recent highs hit 33°C on clear days.
key_factors: Polymarket consensus at 55% vs this market at 32% — large cross-platform discrepancy
Singapore Met Service forecasts afternoon thunderstorms capping heating to 31-32°C range
Climatological March average ~31.7°C positions 32°C as the modal outcome in showery conditions
trades.bear_case: If storms arrive late or are localized, temperature could peak at 33-34°C (like March 26), making exactly 32°C wrong; AccuWeather forecasts 93°F (34°C)

trades.market: Russia military action against Kyiv municipality by March 31?
trades.research_summary: Russia attacks Kyiv with drones/missiles multiple times per week. In 2024 alone, Kyiv endured 1,300+ drone and 250+ missile attacks in 200 airstrikes. In March 2026, the spring offensive has intensified attacks, with massive 948-drone barrage on March 24, confirmed strikes on Kyiv City on March 14 killing 4+, and drones detected over Kyiv region as recently as March 28-29 with power outages in Kyiv city districts.
key_factors: Russia launched spring offensive March 24 with record drone numbers
Kyiv endured ~4 aerial attacks per day in 2024 and 2026 frequency is higher
March 28-29 saw active drones over Kyiv region with ongoing power outages in Kyiv city districts
trades.bear_case: Market resolution criteria may require a specific type of confirmed strike physically within Kyiv city municipal boundaries (vs region) from a specific source, creating resolution ambiguity

trades.research_summary: Ingram is questionable (heel) but played through this same injury Wednesday (6 reb/36 min) and Friday (6 reb/31 min). Coach called it 'not serious.' Season avg 5.6 RPG with ~70% hit rate on over 4.5 in recent games. Market at 20% implies only ~31% play probability, but his pattern of playing through this injury suggests ~55-60%.
key_factors: Played through heel injury last 2 games with 6 rebounds each
Season average 5.6 RPG - well above 4.5 threshold
Coach downplayed injury severity after Monday scratch
Toronto (41-32) in meaningful game vs Orlando (39-34)
trades.bear_case: Could be a late scratch again like Monday - the heel inflammation is recurring and Raptors may choose to rest him with 9 games left

trades.market: Counter-Strike: BIG vs OG (BO1) - Roman Imperium Cup Group C
trades.research_summary: HLTV community vote heavily favors BIG at 82.4% vs OG 17.6%. BIG has significantly stronger map win rates across most maps (78% Dust2, 100% Inferno, 73% Ancient vs OG's 33% Dust2, 50% Ancient). Despite OG's higher world ranking (#42 vs #62), this C-tier LAN rewards current map form over accumulated ranking points.
key_factors: HLTV community vote 82.4% for BIG - large gap vs 62% market
BIG dominant on most maps in recent 3-month window
BO1 LAN format at C-tier event where tier-2 specialists thrive
OG player quality criticized by analysts in recent events
trades.bear_case: OG's higher world ranking (#42 vs #62) reflects genuine strength; BO1 format has high variance; HLTV votes can be unreliable/biased
